trustedBy: Trusted by teams from leading companies
overSubscribers: Specialized in corporate communication and marketing solutions
overFMStations: Providing services in 18+ local languages across Cameroon
proximityText: We give attention to others and are always listening. Our responses are adapted to everyone's needs. We love to succeed and share successes.
simplicityText: We are direct and frank and use language accessible to all. We strive to simplify the complex. We identify the essential and stick to it.
dynamismText: Our energy is constructive and forward-looking. We build on our strengths to push our limits. Our enthusiasm and optimism are contagious.
transparencyText: We are open and explain our choices. We have the principle of saying what we do and doing what we say. We share spontaneously.
privacyPolicyIntro: is committed to protecting and respecting the confidentiality of personal information of its clients and employees.
privacyPolicyText1: Any person who, in a professional or incidental context, accesses confidential information must take all useful precautions to preserve this confidentiality. No employee or partner has the right to disclose externally or internally the information they hold due to their activities related to ProxyCom. A partner also cannot communicate information to employees who are not authorized to become aware of it.
privacyPolicyText2: Any disclosure of commercial, financial, technical and organizational data of ProxyCom or its partners and clients will result in dismissal with the possibility of legal action. All documents and information that are not explicitly intended for external communication are considered confidential.
localCommText: Specialized consulting, multi-form assistance and representation for businesses
marketingText: Specialized studies and targeted business solutions
publicityText: Audiovisual content and diverse communication materials
digitalText: Integrate digital solutions to your services
audioLogItemDescPlaceholder: Catch up on our latest insights, discussions, and updates in our audio log series.
trustPriceText: Effective services at very affordable prices.
trustLoyaltyText: Our loyalty towards our clients and partners.
trustPotentialText: A young, professional, and motivated team.
trustExperienceText: A team of experienced young people who master the field.
clientsNeedsText: Our clients are often looking for ways to connect with local communities, expand their reach, and enhance their tourism offerings while ensuring they are culturally and linguistically relevant.
footerText: Corporate communication, marketing and tourism solutions in Cameroon
campaignEmpty: You don't have any campaigns yet
noRadioStations: No radio stations in this campaign
noAudioLogs: No audio logs for this station
loginErrorGeneric: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
corporateCommunicationDesc: Integrated communication strategies to strengthen your brand image and optimize your presence across all communication channels.
tourismPromotionDesc: Development and implementation of tailored marketing strategies to maximize your commercial and operational impact.
publicityProductionDesc: Optimization of your distribution networks and logistics management for maximum operational efficiency.
globalComm1: Development and implementation of policies - communication strategies and plans
globalComm10: Organization of team building - seminars - company visits - dinner debates - press trips - press conferences - Sponsorship
distribution2: Sales force deployment and monitoring organization
distribution8: Definition of routes - channels - distribution networks
distribution12: Development and management of commercial action plans (client and sales force incentives)
commProximiteDetails: Effectively reach your targets. Speak up and address your targets in their native languages. We have a fleet of more than 130 local radios spread across the national territory. With proxycom, create emotional proximity with your clients and prospects.
commFeature1Desc: More than 130 local radios across the national territory
commFeature2Desc: Communication in local languages for greater proximity
commFeature3Desc: Create authentic connections with your clients and prospects
commFeature4Desc: Extended reach across the entire territory
reportNoData: No records available for this campaign yet.
audioLoadError: This audio file could not be played. It may be missing or in an unsupported format.
noAudioFilesForRecord: No audio files for this record.
noValidatedRecordsFoundForCampaign: No records found for this campaign yet.
periodicReportsSub: Broadcast trend, dayparts and per-station details, sliced by day, week or month.
periodicReportsHint: Leave the dates empty to cover the whole campaign period.
reportRangeClear: Reset to the full campaign period
clHeroSub: Create campaigns, upload your spots and follow their broadcast.
cbNewCampaignSub: It will be saved as a draft — you can add spots and broadcast times before submitting it for approval.
cbSelectStationsSub: Choose the stations that will broadcast this campaign.
cbErrorLoadingStations: Could not load the list of radio stations.
cbErrorDatesRequired: Please choose start and end dates.
cbErrorDateOrder: The end date must be after the start date.
cbErrorStationsRequired: Please select at least one radio station.
cbSubmitNeedsSpot: Upload at least one spot first.
cbSubmitConfirm: Submit this campaign for approval? You will not be able to edit it while it is being reviewed.
cbSubmitted: Campaign submitted for approval. You will be notified once it is reviewed.
cbRejectedHint: You can edit it and submit it again.
cbPendingNotice: This campaign is awaiting approval — it cannot be edited right now.
cbActiveNotice: This campaign is active and being broadcast. Editing is disabled.
cbSpotsSub: Upload the audio ads that will be broadcast (mp3/wav, max 50 MB).
cbSpotNamePh: e.g. OM Compte en Self VF
cbNoSpots: No spots yet. Upload your first audio spot above.
cbErrorSpotSize: The audio file must be 50 MB or less.
cbScheduleSub: Pick a station, then set the times each spot should be broadcast.
cbNoStationsAssigned: No radio stations are assigned to this campaign.
cbProgramHint: Station's published program — click a time to use it:
cbNoSchedules: No broadcast times for this station yet.
cbNoSchedulesUnknown: No broadcast times added in this session for this station.
cbErrorScheduleSpot: Please choose a spot to schedule.
cbExportProgramSub: Download the broadcast plan as Excel
cbScheduleCardsSub: Choose a station to open the schedule editor and drag your spots into its time slots.
seReadOnly: This campaign can no longer be edited — the schedule is shown read-only.
seDragHint: Drag a spot onto a time slot — or tap a spot, then tap a slot.
seViewOnlyHint: Times each spot airs on the selected station.
seNoSlots: This station has no published program yet — add a time slot to get started.
seDuplicate: This spot is already scheduled at {{time}} on this station.
seCopyNeedsSlots: Schedule at least one time first.
cbImportMapHint: Choose which spot each code in the file corresponds to:
cbImportAutoAssign: Automatically add stations found in the file to this campaign
cbTemplateSub: Blank Excel grid with your stations and spot legend, ready to fill in
cbNoProgram: This station has not published a program yet.
cbDeleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all its spots and broadcast times? This cannot be undone.
seDayFollowsBase: This date follows the base plan for this station. Adding times here creates a plan for this day only — the base stays unchanged.
seMaterialize: Start this day from the base plan
seMaterialized: {{created}} times copied from the base plan into {{date}}.
seDayEditingNote: Editing {{date}} only — the base plan is untouched.
cbImportDate: Import into a specific day (optional). Leave empty to follow the file: multi-day exports use their own Date column, plain grids go to the every-day base plan.
seGhostChip: From the base plan — customize this day to change it
cbImportIdenticalSkipped: {{count}} station-day(s) matched the base plan and keep following it.
